case_title: MODAMAS, INC. VS. NAVIS PACK & SHIP

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,134.60 FILED BY MODAMAS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD WIDE LOGISTICS, INC. DBA NAVIS PACKI & SHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD WIDE LOGISTICS, INC. DBA NAVIS PACKI & SHIP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MODAMAS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WORLD WIDE LOGISTICS, INC. DBA NAVIS PACKI & SHIP $959.10 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $989.10, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME TO WORLDWIDE LOGISTICS, INC. DBA NAVIS PACK AND SHIP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODAMAS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-05-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
